quality.description: Quality of a usage/quota signal a harness can emit, from exact vendor accounting through native CLI reporting, engine observation, manual entry, to unknown.

kind.description: What was observed: spend, a rate-limit hit, a used-percent reading, a cooldown, or a manual entry.

usd.description: Observed spend in USD, for spend observations.

used_percent.description: Consumed share of the rate window (0-100), for used_percent observations.

resets_at.description: When the rate window resets, when reported.

cooldown_until.description: Until when the harness is in cooldown, when set.

BudgetObservation.description: An observed quota/usage signal (rate-limit error, used-percent, reset hint) recorded in the budget ledger.
